creator: js@iksz.hu
text:
According to ports/devel/dbus-qt4/Makefile,v 1.14, dbus-qt4 uses the following QT components:

QT_COMPONENTS=  qmake_build moc_build rcc_build corelib gui xml

However, only a sample dbus viewer tool depends on gui, which is not included in the package.  Therefore, this dependence could be removed, and we can save a lot of unnecessary X11-related packages in a server environment.
